name: A Wild Valley
description:
You move slowly through the green vines and thick undergrowth that cover the
valley floor.  It would appear that not many have come here in ages.  To the
west, the land rises to leave the valley.  To the east the vegetation clears to
give way to a strange uprising of stone.  Up you will enter in the necromancers
test area.

exits.description: The uprising looks like some huge beast set to pounce.

extra_descriptions.description: The uprising looks like some huge beast set to pounce.
